title: GO-bundle loader consumes the POOLED confirmatory report (gate.verdict + pooling.live_instruments)
why: execution/osr_bundle.py currently reads a per-instrument confirmatory gate_result; under the section-7 pooled amendment the GO bundle must be driven by the pooled report: gate verdict evaluated once + live_instruments narrowed by the asymmetric stratification veto. Without this wiring a GO on Jun-18 cannot mechanically produce the frozen live config.
scope: Adapt execution/osr_bundle.py (writer + load_osr_bundle validation) to the pooled confirmatory JSON shape: bundle instruments = pooling.live_instruments (post-veto), provenance = POOLED.json + pooled confirmatory report + holdout marker; keep REGISTERED_GATE_CLAUSES pin in sync with the pooled gate call; tests mirror existing osr_bundle suite. Coordinate with runbook section-8 GO-day checklist wording.
